etymology.description: 多(多) (duō, 'many')'s ancient form 夛 with semantic duplication of 夕(夕) (xī, 'evening')
etymology.interpretation: The character 夛 is an ancient form of 多(多) (duō, 'many'), where 夕(夕) (xī, 'evening') is duplicated to convey the idea of 'many', following the pattern that repetition intensifies meaning, similar to how 林(lin) ('forest') is formed by repeating 木(mù, 'tree').
